name: Number C39: Utopia Ray Victory
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>３９ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>希</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>望</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ホープレイ・ヴィクトリー
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Nanbāzu Sanjūkyū Kibōō Hōpurei Vikutorī
name_jp_tl: Chaos Numbers 39: King of Wishes, Hope Ray Victory
desc:
3 Level 5 monsters
If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate any Spell/Trap Cards until the end of the Damage Step. If this card has a "Utopia" monster as an Xyz Material, it gains this effect.
● When this card declares an attack on a face-up monster your opponent controls: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card; negate that opponent's face-up monster's effects, also this card gains ATK equal to that opponent's monster's ATK. These changes last until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff:
3 Level 5 monsters

● When this card declares an attack on a face-up monster your opponent controls: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card; negate that opponent's face-up monster's effects, also this card gains ATK equal to that opponent's monster's ATK. These changes last until the end of this turn.

mst: Gains effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
